references.name: Commands Reference
references.description: Master command reference — all user-facing slash commands organized by domain group with usage patterns and implementation notes.

references.name: Commands User Guide
references.description: User-facing guide for all Knowledge platform commands — usage patterns, command groups, contextual help. Evolves as legacy commands are imported.

scripts.description: Multipart help — outputs Part 1 command tables from commands.md
Contextual help — extracts help for a specific command with section context and publication links
Documentation validation — D1 (system) and D2 (user) execution for doc freshness checks
Generate animated OG social preview GIFs — dual-theme webcards with content-specific animations
Generate OG social preview PNG images — dark theme, content-specific visuals
Web page rendering — Playwright + Chromium screenshots and Mermaid diagram export
Project compilation — aggregates project data for publication and profile generation
Project creation — local registration + GitHub Project board + tracking issue
Visual CLI — argparse entry point for the visual documentation engine
Visual engine — OpenCV + Pillow video processing, frame extraction, detection, evidence reports
Live stream capture — rolling MP4 clips to git-synced queue for near-live monitoring
Clip cleanup — discard old dynamic clips after session ends
